Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Mariala]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 4''' — Mariala is a student whose specialty is fortune magic.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 28''' — Mariala is a student on the shuttle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — Mariala is a student on the Zenith Starship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 51''' — Mariala is someone the narrator's students could contact.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 24''' — Mariala has seen the narrator's summons in action before.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 35''' — Mariala was present behind the narrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 36''' — Mariala is a student and uses a wand.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 9''' — Mariala is an actual wizard who passed her certification.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 28''' — Mariala can prepare spells in advance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 28''' — Mariala can cast fortune spells.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 28''' — Mariala can cast offensive spells.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 31''' — Mariala represents the group of six students.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 31''' — Mariala has an optical implant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 31''' — Mariala pulled a mantle around her neck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 31''' — Mariala has never served in the Union military.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
